title: Corporate HQ — HITEC City
overview: Full-floor corporate fit-out with executive boardroom, open workplace, and client-facing reception.
brief: A growing technology firm needed a full-floor headquarters that signals maturity to clients while supporting hybrid work — focused pods, collaboration lounges, and an executive suite that hosts board-level meetings without a separate off-site venue.
approach: Workplace strategy led the plan: we mapped actual meeting culture before sizing rooms, then specified acoustic glass, modular AV, and durable stone-and-timber finishes at client touch points. Night-shift phasing kept the tower operational while MEP upgrades and ceiling works progressed floor by floor.
materials: Stone and timber at reception and boardroom
Modular carpet tile in open workplace

execution.details: Night-shift phasing for occupied tower; single PMO desk for design, procurement, and site.

outcome.summary: Full floor handed over in a single programme with documented commissioning — reception, workplace, and executive zones opened together without phased client disruption.

testimonial.quote: They delivered our corporate floor on programme without compromising design intent. One team, one point of accountability — exactly what we needed.
testimonial.name: Priya
